rankings.title: Does Naming Work? Mandatory Food Hygiene Rating Display and Restaurant Market Discipline
conditions: validating entry/exit measurement—ideally using FSA “new/closed” establishment flags or local inspection histories rather than Companies House alone
delivering a tight mechanism chain with “bite” checks such as compliance/display evidence
consumer salience proxies

rankings.title: The Fiscal Externalities of Poverty: Council Tax Support Cuts and Neighborhood Spillovers
Planning Deregulation and the Office-to-Residential Conversion Shock
conditions: a defensible design beyond treated-vs-exempt DiD—ideally border-based or using renewal timing
obtaining a strong first-stage measure of office-to-resi conversion intensity at fine geography

such as a simulated instrument or political IV
